name: stormscope
description: Real-time US weather data: conditions, forecasts, alerts, severe weather outlooks, radar, upper-air analysis, and surface fronts
long_description:
StormScope brings real-time US weather intelligence to Claude. It aggregates data from NWS, NOAA Storm Prediction Center, Weather Prediction Center, Iowa Environmental Mesonet radar, and Open-Meteo upper-air model data into 9 tools that give Claude deep weather awareness.

Capabilities include current conditions, multi-format forecasts (daily narrative, hourly, raw gridpoint), active weather alerts with severity filtering, SPC severe weather outlooks (categorical and probabilistic), national severe outlook with region descriptions, NEXRAD radar metadata, 500mb upper-air analysis with derived vorticity, surface frontal analysis with warm/cold sector detection, and a combined briefing that adapts to the situation.

Optionally integrates with your WeatherFlow Tempest personal weather station for hyper-local sensor data: solar radiation, UV index, lightning strikes, air density, and wet bulb temperature.

US locations only. Covers all 50 states, DC, and US territories.

tools.name: get_conditions
tools.description: Get current weather conditions: temperature, wind, humidity, sky, pressure

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast in daily narrative, hourly, or raw gridpoint format

tools.name: get_alerts
tools.description: Get active weather alerts with severity filtering

tools.name: get_spc_outlook
tools.description: Check SPC severe weather outlook: categorical risk or probabilistic tornado/wind/hail

tools.name: get_national_outlook
tools.description: Get CONUS-wide SPC severe weather risk areas with region descriptions

tools.name: get_radar
tools.description: Get NEXRAD radar info with weather summary and imagery links

tools.name: get_upper_air
tools.description: Get 500mb upper-air analysis: heights, temperature, wind, and derived vorticity

tools.name: get_surface_analysis
tools.description: Get surface analysis: fronts, pressure centers, warm/cold sector detection

tools.name: get_briefing
tools.description: Get a comprehensive weather briefing combining conditions, forecast, alerts, and outlook

primary_latitude.title: Primary Latitude
primary_latitude.description: Default latitude for weather queries (e.g. 44.98 for Minneapolis)

primary_longitude.title: Primary Longitude
primary_longitude.description: Default longitude for weather queries (e.g. -93.27 for Minneapolis)

units.title: Units
units.description: Unit system: 'us' for Fahrenheit/mph or 'si' for Celsius/km/h

tempest_token.title: Tempest Token
tempest_token.description: WeatherFlow Tempest Personal Access Token (optional, enables hyper-local station data)

tempest_station_id.title: Tempest Station ID
tempest_station_id.description: Specific Tempest station ID to use (optional, auto-discovers nearest if omitted)

tempest_station_name.title: Tempest Station Name
tempest_station_name.description: Tempest station name to match instead of ID (optional)

use_tempest_station_geolocation.title: Use Tempest Station Location
use_tempest_station_geolocation.description: Use your Tempest station's GPS coordinates as the default location

enable_corelocation.title: Enable macOS CoreLocation
enable_corelocation.description: Use macOS WiFi-based location detection as fallback (macOS only, requires Xcode Command Line Tools)
